items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Jim Barnett. Oregon SG was drafted 8th by BOS in 66 but was let go to SD in expansion. Peaked at 18.5 w/POR in 70-71. Known for reckless shots & got nickname Crazyhorse. Also played w/NO & NY thru 77. Per bio "he could make coffee nervous."
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Jim Barnett. Oregon SG was drafted 8th by BOS in 66 but was let go to SD in expansion. Peaked at 18.5 w/POR in 70-71. Known for reckless shots & got nickname Crazyhorse. Also played w/NO & NY thru 77. Per bio "he could make coffee nervous."
